title: Community Features & Mastery Systems
summary: Adds social and mastery systems: solution replays with animated playback, adaptive placement test for new players, real-world circuit visualizations, mystery Dark Gate in Chapter 2, visual share card generation, mastery tree skill progression, circuit collection gallery, hint token economy, personal logic profile dashboard, and circuit aesthetics scoring with Clean Circuit badge.

tasks.description: Solution Replays — Record gate/wire placement actions during solving. Store replay data in localStorage keyed by level. Add 'Watch Replay' button on solved levels that animates gates and wires appearing sequentially with timing.
acceptance_criteria: Actions (addGate, addWire) are recorded with timestamps during gameplay
Replay data stored in localStorage per level on completion
Watch Replay button appears on level select for completed levels
Clicking replay animates the build sequence on the canvas

tasks.description: Adaptive Difficulty / Placement Test — On first launch (no progress), offer a 3-question placement test. Each question shows a truth table and gate options. Correct answers skip player ahead past tutorial chapters. Store test result.
acceptance_criteria: Placement test modal appears on first launch only (no existing progress)
3 progressive questions testing gate knowledge
Correct answers unlock early chapters automatically
Test result stored in localStorage, never shown again

tasks.description: Real World Visualization — Enhance chapter completion modals with real-world hardware connections. Show how the player's circuits map to real devices (calculators, CPUs, network routers).
acceptance_criteria: Each chapter completion modal shows a real-world hardware connection
Visual shows progression: gates → chip → device
Content is educational and specific to the chapter's concepts

tasks.description: Dark Gate / Mystery Mechanic — Add a '?' mystery gate type. Create one level that includes it. Player must experiment (toggle inputs, observe outputs) to discover its behavior, then use it to solve the puzzle.
acceptance_criteria: MYSTERY gate type defined with hidden truth table behavior
Gate renders as '?' with distinctive visual styling
Player can place it and toggle inputs to discover behavior
At least one level uses the mystery gate

tasks.description: Visual Share Card — Generate a branded share card on level completion using Canvas2D. Card shows level name, stars, gate count, time, and Signal Circuit branding. Offer 'Save Card' button that downloads the image.
acceptance_criteria: Share card generated as canvas image on completion
Card includes: level name, stars, gate count, time, branding
Download button saves PNG to device
Card looks good at share-friendly dimensions (1200x630)

tasks.description: Mastery Tree Visual Progression — Add a 'Mastery Tree' modal accessible from level select. Shows gate concepts as nodes in a tree. Nodes light up as player masters concepts. Branches show prerequisite relationships.
acceptance_criteria: Mastery Tree button on level select screen
Tree shows gate types as nodes with connections
Completed concepts glow/highlight
Locked concepts shown dimmed with prerequisite path visible

tasks.description: Circuit Collection Gallery — Save completed circuit snapshots (gate types + positions + wire connections) per level. Gallery modal shows thumbnails of all saved circuits, organized by chapter.
acceptance_criteria: Circuit data saved to localStorage on level completion
Gallery button accessible from level select
Gallery shows circuit summaries organized by chapter
Each entry shows level name, gate count, stars, date

tasks.description: Hint Token Economy — Replace free hints with a token system. Players earn tokens from achievements, daily challenges, and streaks. Each hint costs 1 token. First 3 tokens given free on start. Token count displayed in UI.
acceptance_criteria: Hint tokens tracked in localStorage
New players start with 3 free tokens
Using a hint deducts 1 token
Tokens earned from: daily challenge (+1), streak milestone (+1), achievement unlock (+1)
Token count visible on hint button

tasks.description: Your Logic Profile — Enhanced mastery dashboard showing per-gate-type proficiency, strongest/weakest areas, recommended next level, and improvement trends.
acceptance_criteria: Profile button on level select
Shows per-gate proficiency (based on levels using each gate)
Identifies strongest and weakest gate type
Recommends what to play next based on gaps

tasks.description: Circuit Aesthetics Recognition — Score circuits on visual cleanliness: wire crossing count, gate alignment, routing efficiency. Award 'Clean Circuit' bonus badge for elegant solutions.
acceptance_criteria: Aesthetics score calculated on level completion
Score based on wire crossings and gate alignment
Clean Circuit badge awarded for high-score solutions
Score shown in post-completion UI

testing_focus: All new modals open and close correctly
localStorage doesn't exceed quota with all new data
Placement test only shows on first launch
Replay playback doesn't break canvas state
Share card renders at proper dimensions
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
